content.text:
[cron:ac6cb972-3a5b-4f41-8bcd-ed5264ac20b0 Nashville Morning Brief (6:30 AM + 4:00 PM Weekdays)] Create an ULTRA-COMPACT Nashville Brief using ONLY tessie, smart-route, daily-news-digest. HARD LIMIT: 90-110 words total. Bullets only. Exactly 3 bullets: (1) Tesla: battery, range, charging. (2) Route: ETA to Downtown Nashville or 'Unavailable: <short reason>'. (3) Local news: max 2 Nashville/Middle TN one-line headlines; no international news. End with one final line: '**✅ Quick Focus:** <very short action>'. No other text.
Current time: Saturday, February 28th, 2026 — 12:51 AM (UTC)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

- **Tesla:** Unavailable: Tessie skill/data not accessible in this run (no live battery, range, or charging status available right now).  
- **Route:** Unavailable: smart-route tool/skill not available in this run, so live ETA to Downtown Nashville could not be retrieved.  
- **Local news (Nashville/Middle TN):** Unavailable: daily-news-digest source/tool not available in this run, so no verified local headlines can be provided at this moment.  

**✅ Quick Focus:** Open Tessie + Maps and check one battery/top-up decision now.
